case_title: CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC. VS LARACEA CARLOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $425.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LARACEA CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARACEA CARLOS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARACEA CARLOS $425.00 PRINCIPAL, $89.25 INTEREST, $43.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $557.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LARACEA CARLOS HEARING SET FOR NOV-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-24-1992, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LARACEA CARLOS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-04-1993, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-19-1993, OFF CALENDAR
